offer: For property managers processing 10-20 work orders/month, inefficient manual processing causes delayed maintenance. We automate work order processing instead of manual tracking and processing of work orders.
problem: Inefficient manual processing of work orders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tool sharing
try_it: Let users try maintenance scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps required in onboarding process
